bundles.title: Insert Registry Module
bundles.goal: Create src/contracts/inserts.ts exporting a ReadonlyMap of insert keys to generator functions wrapping existing helpers

tasks.title: Audit command-bodies.ts to inventory all shared snippet calls (buildOpenspecPrereq, buildDesignArtifactInstruction, renderPhaseSection, etc.) and their call-site arguments
Define the InsertRegistry type as ReadonlyMap<string, (arg?: string) => string> in src/contracts/inserts.ts
Register buildOpenspecPrereq as openspec_prereq(<commandName>) with argument parsing
Extract buildDesignArtifactInstruction from command-bodies.ts, export from inserts.ts as design_artifact_instruction
Register renderPhaseSection entries for render: tags and phaseContractRegistry entries for contract: tags
Register any remaining shared prose fragments identified in the audit (e.g., important_rules.common)
Write unit tests for every registry entry verifying output matches current inline invocations

bundles.title: Template Resolver Engine
bundles.goal: Implement resolveTemplate() that parses .md.tmpl files and resolves {{insert:}}, {{contract:}}, and {{render:}} tags into CommandSection[]

tasks.title: Define ResolvedSections interface and resolveTemplate() function signature in src/contracts/template-resolver.ts
Implement template file reader that reads .md.tmpl content from disk given a path
Implement regex-based tag parser for {{insert: <key>}}, {{contract: <phase>}}, and {{render: <phase>}} (depth-1 only, no nesting)
Implement tag resolution: insert tags resolve via insertRegistry, contract tags emit JSON from phaseContractRegistry, render tags call renderPhaseMarkdown()
Implement section splitting: parse resolved Markdown into CommandSection[] using heading-based boundaries matching current renderBody() structure
Add hard-error on unresolved tags (missing insert key, unknown phase name, missing template file)
Write unit tests for each tag kind including error cases (unknown key, malformed tag, missing file)

bundles.title: CommandBody Type Extension + Validation
bundles.goal: Add optional templatePath to CommandBody and extend contract validation to check template file existence

tasks.title: Add readonly templatePath?: string to CommandBody interface in src/types/contracts.ts
Extend validateContracts() in src/lib/contracts.ts to check that templatePath files exist on disk when declared
Add validation that commands with templatePath have empty sections array (sections will be populated by resolver)
Write unit tests for the new validation rules (missing template file, valid template path)

bundles.title: Capture Pre-Migration Snapshot Baselines
bundles.goal: Capture the full renderCommands() output for every command as snapshot baselines before any migration changes

tasks.title: Create snapshot test file src/tests/command-output.test.ts that renders every command and compares to snapshot
Generate baseline snapshots by running the test suite in update mode
Verify snapshots cover all commands in commandBodies
Commit snapshot baselines as a reference point

bundles.title: Extract Template Source Files
bundles.goal: Extract prose content from command-bodies.ts into assets/commands/*.md.tmpl files with insertion tags replacing inline function calls

tasks.title: Create assets/commands/ directory
Extract specflow.md.tmpl — replace buildOpenspecPrereq() call with {{insert: openspec_prereq(specflow)}} and renderPhaseSection() calls with {{render: <phase>}} tags
Extract specflow.apply.md.tmpl with appropriate insertion tags
Extract specflow.design.md.tmpl with appropriate insertion tags
Extract remaining command templates (specflow.review_design, specflow.review_apply, specflow.fix_design, specflow.fix_apply, etc.)
Extract specflow.approve, specflow.reject, specflow.explore, specflow.setup templates
Extract utility command templates (specflow.spec, specflow.readme, specflow.license, specflow.dashboard, specflow.decompose)
Verify every command in commandBodies has a corresponding .md.tmpl file

bundles.title: Build Pipeline Integration
bundles.goal: Wire resolveAllTemplates() into src/build.ts between validateContracts() and renderCommands()

tasks.title: Implement resolveAllTemplates() that iterates contracts.commands and calls resolveTemplate() for each command with a templatePath
Insert resolveAllTemplates() call in build.ts main() between validateContracts() and renderCommands()
Ensure resolveAllTemplates() produces new CommandContract objects (immutable) with sections populated from templates
Write integration test that runs the full build pipeline and verifies dist/ output matches pre-migration baselines

bundles.title: Slim Down command-bodies.ts
bundles.goal: Refactor command-bodies.ts to export only frontmatter + templatePath per command, removing all inline string literal sections

tasks.title: Replace each command entry's sections array with an empty array and add templatePath pointing to assets/commands/<id>.md.tmpl
Remove unused imports (buildOpenspecPrereq, renderPhaseSection, etc.) from command-bodies.ts
Remove buildDesignArtifactInstruction and renderPhaseSection from command-bodies.ts (now live in inserts.ts)
Verify command-bodies.ts is ~100 lines of metadata declarations
Run full build and verify dist/ output is unchanged

bundles.title: Snapshot Verification + Package Exclusion
bundles.goal: Verify all snapshot tests pass post-migration and update package configuration to exclude template source files

tasks.title: Run snapshot tests and verify all commands produce identical output to pre-migration baselines
Update .npmignore or package.json files field to exclude assets/commands/ from the published package
Run npm run build and verify dist/ output is complete and correct
Run full test suite and verify 80%+ coverage for new modules (inserts.ts, template-resolver.ts)
Verify no inline content strings remain in command-bodies.ts
